description: Open, versioned definition of ONE kanae aggregation OR narrative-prompt heuristic. R0 skeleton per ADR-2605302300 §4 G6 (open method). Every kanae.fundFlowEdge and kanae.flowNarrative MUST cite the methodNote CID of the heuristic that produced it, so the public can audit the AGGREGATION itself (the join logic, the currency normalization, the narrative prompt), not only the rendered picture. No closed / secret aggregation is permitted. Mirrors danjo.methodNote discipline. `knownFalsePositiveModes` are mandatory at R1 (each method documents why a pattern is NOT, by itself, evidence of wrongdoing — G4).

appliesToFlowClass.description: The fundFlowEdge.flowClass value(s) this heuristic produces or aggregates

definition.description: Full open description of the heuristic: joins, thresholds, currency normalization, narrative-prompt template, exclusions, false-positive caveats. Precise enough to reproduce.

inputs.description: gov.dataset.* / danjo.* / corp.* / kanae.* lexicons the heuristic consumes

thresholdParams.description: JSON-encoded parameter set (e.g. {"joinOn":["recipientLei","fiscalPeriod"]}); open and versioned

knownFalsePositiveModes.description: Documented FP modes (transparency requirement; prevents over-claiming; G4)
